nasb.text: Simon Peter answered Him, “Lord, to whom shall we go? You have words of eternal life.

esv.text: Simon Peter answered him, “Lord, to whom shall we go? You have the words of eternal life,

cnv.text: 西門．彼得回答：“主啊，你有永生之道，我們還跟從誰呢？

ccb.text: 西门·彼得答道：“主啊！你有永生之道，我们还跟从谁呢？

csbs.text: 西门彼得回答：“主啊，你有永恒生命的话语，我们还去归从谁呢？
